His elevation signifies a crucial leadership transition, testing Iran's political resilience as it seeks a permanent successor.

title: CEO of America's largest bank Jamie Dimon says: We have displaced people for AI, and ...
description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon urges businesses and governments to prepare for AI-driven labor disruption, emphasizing proactive planning over reactive measures.
